recommendations.title: Seven Up!
recommendations.overview: A group of British children aged 7 from widely ranging backgrounds are interviewed about a range of subjects. The filmmakers plan to re-interview them at 7 year intervals to track how their lives and attitudes change as they age.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Andre the Giant
recommendations.overview: An ambitious and wide-ranging documentary exploring Andre’s upbringing in France, his celebrated career in WWE, and his forays in the entertainment world.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: Interstellar: Nolan's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: A look behind the lens of Christopher Nolan's space epic.

recommendations.title: Rocko's Modern Life: Static Cling
recommendations.overview: After 20 years in space, Rocko returns to a technologically advanced O-Town and makes it his mission to get his favorite show back on the air.

recommendations.title: Inside the Mind of a Cat
recommendations.overview: Cat experts dive into the mind of the feline to reveal the true capabilities of the pouncing pet in this captivating and cuddly documentary.

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.
